title: pittosporum johnstonianum var. johnstonianum
intro: Pittosporum johnstonianum var. johnstonianum, also known as Kauri tobacco or Kawakawa, is a plant species native to the Pacific Islands, particularly New Zealand and Tonga. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and antibacterial properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Pittosporum johnstonianum var. johnstonianum include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and reduce the risk of certain cancers. The plant can be prepared in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
